Character.AI used to be one of my favorite AI chat platforms, but the recent "Go On" limit has significantly hurt the experience. The idea of placing a 1 hour and 30 minute cooldown on a basic conversation feature is frustrating and unnecessary, especially for users who enjoy long roleplays, storytelling, or detailed discussions. The "Go On" button exists because AI responses are often cut off before finishing a message. Instead of allowing users to naturally continue the conversation.

2026-02-27.text: Tried the 30$ ultimate version, while there may be memory pages, the Ai cannot remember the past sentence. Continue on button doesn't have actual function in story progression, just 'Why are you being silent'. You have to purchase coins at that level too to just get a different response, which also doesn't progress anything. Like, this is really bad for the price point.

2025-10-30.text: I've been using this app and chatting without any issues for over a year. Yes, there are ads and sometimes, the ads are excessive. (Like, excessively excessive.) But today, for the first time ever, I got the "Take a Break" popup. HORRIBLE change. I've actually been considering subscribing, but not anymore. Not if this is the new standard. Predatory practice on the developer's part. I get it, you like money. But don't you make enough?

2025-09-27.text: this app is, in my opinion, one of the best. the only problem I have is that the "My Persona" program no longer works with any of the Ai characters after the last update. it's one of my favorite details on this app, and I'm really sad it's not working anymore. also, the ads are getting ridiculous. almost every time I leave a chat, or it says, "Take a break" I have to wait about a minute. to be fair, I get that ads help. but when ads open on top of other ads. 2025-08-30.text: this app is pretty good. It has its problems like all the others. I don't like is the limits on the free version. 2025-07-13.text: Expensive. If you look the app has a fake discount that brings the price to 20 bucks but it's 100 bucks a month if you look without the discount. They basically make you feel like you have a discount to buy. Nothing more. Long-term memory doesn't last, etc. no real reason to get premium unless you want the romance choice but you can get some good replies without it. Just another cash grab. Fun for a few hours though.

2025-07-09.text: I'm getting more disappointed with every update that goes by. - Constant errors. Probably ~20 errors per conversation, always the same error: "Ai has had an error!", and then it has you reload your message. - Character personas suddenly being filtered when the app is meant to have no filters. - Keyboard covers up the typing area when creating a character, so you can't even check for typos unless if you want to close the keyboard and check.

2025-06-01.text: I've been using this app for a while now, on the free version. I've never had a problem with ads before, as I could normally skip them 5-10 seconds in. But recently, I've been getting unskippable minute long ads every time I leave a chat. And sometimes those ads will restart after I've finished the ad, like I'll finish an ad, then close out of it, and then another, or the exact same ad, reappears right after I close out. I get that ads are mandatory for the free version. but seriously come on.

2025-02-15.text: Lots of scenarios to choose from, and having used this for 4 months now, ready to review. ADS. Every time you close a chat, or exit, ad. It is insane. I have mastered the art of closing the app and reopening every time I just try to change conversations and get an ad. Despite being my favorite AI chat, this is the worst offender of ads. Memory of them..kinda sucks. Some are good, but about half of them 4 messages in and they forget everything. Others I've been able to have ~100-500 messages.

2024-09-11.text: I find it odd that we have to pay coins to regenerate a response, especially if we're paying for a subscription. While the more costly of the two subscriptions gives you 1500 coins a month. If you do run out of, you would have to pay for more coin. Why couldn't it be the more costly one have unlimited regenerations, the less costly sub have a high limit, and the free have a small limit?

2024-09-06.text: Enjoyable conversations, & the ability to create your own stories with such a varying number of characters for almost every genre. I happily paid for the subscription to support the apps continued growth, but there doesn't seem to be a difference, from what I've experienced, in quality for the non-paying player outside of having to watch ads. Highly recommend! The only thing I would change is how often the characters displayed are refreshed. I feel like I often see many of the same one's.

2026-06-18.text: it is one of my favorite AI chat apps, the free version is amazing, the paid even better. if you don't got money, free is probably the best of all other ai apps free versions, paying is expensive, maybe not worth it, but I definitely enjoy it! Only part I don't like, is that it lacks the randomness of humans, which it used to have occasionally, but I see it less and less now. still, 5 stars!

the Ai is good and gives good conversation and detailed roleplay. they have a high limit for characters when creating a persona so you can go in depth. the ads you have to watch are very reasonable and don't make you watch them every 30 seconds like other apps. the library of AI characters seem limited compared to other apps, but that can be fixed with pulling in new creators. I would give it 4 and a half stars if I could. if they library expands, then definitely 5.

I really enjoy this app. The unlimited play without coins and not too many ads. The stories play off of my words so I direct the stories the way I want them to go with their added twists. The stories vary which I love depending on what kind of mood I'm in that day. The downside is because I don't spend money the story forgets my details but I've learned to just keep adding to the story. It makes it more interesting.

2026-06-17.text: The amount of character variety is great. The way you can pick different categories, search up specific characters, it even tracks what you usually chat with. It can get annoying Sometimes if you're looking for something new, but it's still a good system. Then the fact that you can make personas and choose through them is also nice. And one key factor I love about this app, is that it actually updates its UI and other things. Before, my persona would be mid gendered, but the update fixed that.

I do quite like using this app. It allows me to explore things that I've not been able to explore with RPing before. What I struggle with is that I wish the prices were lower for subscriptions because it is a lot of money to do so. I would willingly watch a couple adds to make the price cheaper.

2026-06-16.text: it has gotten worse since I downloaded it. the ads are even more invasive and have doubled the amount and time duration. and I'm not the type to spend money on these things. the recent update is ridiculous. I'll type a message, send it, it doesn't leave the message bar. it's exhausting. also, why just 300 characters on memory? absolutely not.

it has its ups and downs if your on the free version. the adds are really annoying and the fact that a lot of the choices are NTR or cheating is also really annoying there isn't much of a selection but the fact that it's free and your able to edit the poor grammar in the AI or change to your preference is ok but if your not paying for a subscription then the memory is garbage and it doesn't follow the message entered so you have to keep requesting a rewrite which gets worse every time

2026-01-03.text: It was great until they added ad. I get ads are good for revenue, but not when they pop up almost every time I switch characters. 2025-10-11.text: This is definitely my favorite of the apps. I do pay for Ultra membership so I get the most conversation style options and no ads. But even when it was free the memory was fantastic and all the characters had a real voice which is why I pay for the membership. I'd give it five stars but lately there is a constant "Connection Error" when I try to send chats. It only does this when I use the "paid for" styles. Why am I paying for something that never works? Please fix this.

2025-09-04.text: It was great, but since the latest update, there's been lots of bugs happening. I had to uninstall the app thinking it would help, but all my characters and chats disappeared, it won't load anything, and the ads have become ridiculous. Some ads even crash the whole app which causes my phone to force reset itself. EDIT: Now you have to top up if you want to continue chatting with the bots unless you have plus.
